<Badge text="on-call-handoff-patterns" variant="note" /> <Badge text="21 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Curated" variant="note" /> <Badge text="install-now-after-trust-gate" variant="default" />

> `wshobson/agents` backend, monorepo, incident, and eval residual beyond the existing curated subset.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add wshobson/agents --skill fastapi-templates --skill nodejs-backend-patterns --skill postmortem-writing --skill on-call-handoff-patterns --skill nx-workspace-patterns --skill turborepo-caching --skill langchain-architecture --skill llm-evaluation -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/on-call-handoff-patterns`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/on-call-handoff-patterns.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add wshobson/agents --skill fastapi-templates --skill nodejs-backend-patterns --skill postmortem-writing --skill on-call-handoff-patterns --skill nx-workspace-patterns --skill turborepo-caching --skill langchain-architecture --skill llm-evaluation -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: `wshobson/agents` backend, monorepo, incident, and eval residual beyond the existing curated subset.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

On-call handoff / incident patterns. From wshobson/agents (large multi-harness marketplace, 84 plugins/156 skills; one Markdown source to 5 harnesses).

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add wshobson/agents --skill on-call-handoff-patterns -y -g -a antigravity claude-code ...` status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named. Review outputs for safety (esp. generators, k8s, tf, secrets).

## Upstream Maintainer

[wshobson/agents](https://github.com/wshobson/agents) â€” MIT, broad agentic patterns + quality eval (plugin-eval).

## Comparable Alternatives

Similar patterns in trailofbits, vercel, local skills/* or other curated (e.g. python from modern-python, k8s from hashicorp). General on call handoff patterns instruction.

&gt; Web evidence from wshobson/agents github (README, docs, example SKILLs 2026) + config notes. Evidence only.
